introSection:
Desafío is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Parque de la Costa in Tigre, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

It was manufactured by Vekoma and is a Suspended Looping Coaster model. It is the first of this kind in all of Latin America.
fullText:
Desafío is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Parque de la Costa in Tigre, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

It was manufactured by Vekoma and is a Suspended Looping Coaster model. It is the first of this kind in all of Latin America.
